verses.1: The LORD says, “Where is the bill of your mother’s divorce, with which I have put her away?
verses.2: Why, when I came, was there no one?
verses.3: I clothe the heavens with blackness.
verses.4: The Lord GOD has given me the tongue of those who are taught,
verses.5: The Lord GOD has opened my ear.
verses.6: I gave my back to those who beat me,
verses.7: For the Lord GOD will help me.
verses.8: He who justifies me is near.
verses.9: Behold, the Lord GOD will help me!
verses.10: Who among you fears the LORD
verses.11: Behold, all you who kindle a fire,
